shortFormVideo.hook: Contractors do not just lose leads from bad traffic. They lose jobs in the first five minutes after someone asks for help.
shortFormVideo.brief: Open on a contractor website form. Show the missed-lead problem, then the fix: instant confirmation, job qualification, urgency tags, owner alert, and follow-up reminders. End on the Melbourne Web Studio lead leak quiz and the EB28 article URL.
